simple_meaning_en: Goods or services sold and payment received immediately in cash, bank, or wallet
simple_meaning_np: सामान वा सेवा बेचेर तुरुन्तै नगद, बैंक वा वालेटबाट पैसा प्राप्त हुने
romanized_examples: aja 5000 ko bikri bhayo cash ma
english_examples: Sold goods for Rs.5000 cash today
Cash sale of Rs.2000
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Wallet [amount] / Cr Sales Revenue [amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by quantity sold at cost; increase COGS
tax_rule_placeholder: Determine if VAT applies based on registration status and item category; confirm current VAT rate with IRD Nepal before including in bill
clarification_questions: Payment mode cash, bank, or wallet ho?
Bill VAT sahit ho ki non-VAT ho?
example_user_inputs: aja 5000 ko bikri bhayo cash ma
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: cash_sale, debit: [Cash/Bank/Wallet], credit: [Sales Revenue], amount: 5000, inventory_effect: reduce, tax_effect: pending_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: Goods or services sold to a customer without immediate payment, creating a receivable
simple_meaning_np: ग्राहकलाई उधारोमा सामान वा सेवा दिइने, प्राप्य रकम सिर्जना हुने
romanized_examples: customer lai credit ma maal diye
english_examples: Sold goods on credit to Mr. Sharma for Rs.7000
Gave goods to Ram on credit worth Rs.5000
journal_entry_rule: Dr Accounts Receivable (Customer) [amount] / Cr Sales Revenue [amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by quantity sold at cost; increase COGS
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm VAT applicability and rate before finalizing invoice value
clarification_questions: Kun customer lai diyeko ho, naam ke ho?
Payment kahile aune expected cha?
example_user_inputs: ram lai 5000 ko saman udharo diyo
Sharma lai 7000 ko credit ma becheko
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: credit_sale, debit: [Accounts Receivable - Ram], credit: [Sales Revenue], amount: 5000, inventory_effect: reduce, tax_effect: pending_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: A sale where a formal VAT invoice is issued and VAT is charged on top of or included in the price
simple_meaning_np: भ्याट बिल जारी गरिने बिक्री, जसमा भ्याट थपिने वा समावेश हुने
romanized_examples: vat bill banau yo bikri ko
english_examples: Please generate a VAT bill for this sale
Issued a VAT-inclusive invoice for Rs.11,300
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Receivable [gross amount] / Cr Sales Revenue [net amount] / Cr VAT Payable [VAT amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by quantity sold at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: VAT rate and applicability must be confirmed from the current Finance Act and IRD Nepal notices; do not assume a fixed percentage
clarification_questions: Yo business VAT registered ho?
Stated amount VAT inclusive ho ki exclusive ho?
example_user_inputs: vat bill banau yo bikri ko
aja vat sahit bill katiyo 11300 ko
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: vat_sale, debit: [Cash/Bank/Receivable], credit: [Sales Revenue, VAT Payable], amount: 11300, tax_effect: rate_pending_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: A sale recorded with only a PAN bill or plain receipt, no VAT charged
simple_meaning_np: पान बिल वा सामान्य रसिद मात्र दिइने बिक्री, भ्याट नलागिने
romanized_examples: pan bill matra diyeko cha vat chaina
english_examples: Issued a plain PAN bill, no VAT applied
Non-VAT retail sale of Rs.2500
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Receivable [amount] / Cr Sales Revenue [amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by quantity sold at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm whether business is below VAT threshold or item is VAT-exempt per current IRD rules before treating as non-VAT
clarification_questions: Business VAT registered ho ki chaina?
Yo item VAT-exempt category ma parcha ki pardaina?
example_user_inputs: pan bill matra diyeko cha vat chaina
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: non_vat_sale, debit: [Cash/Bank/Receivable], credit: [Sales Revenue], amount: 2500, tax_effect: no_vat_applied}

simple_meaning_en: A single sale settled across multiple payment modes such as part cash, part card, part credit
simple_meaning_np: एउटै बिक्री बिभिन्न भुक्तानी माध्यम (नगद, कार्ड, उधारो) मा विभाजित हुने
romanized_examples: half cash half credit ma becheko
cash bank esewa mix ma bikri bhayo
english_examples: Sold goods for Rs.55,000, half cash half credit
Total sale split across cash, bank, and wallet
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash [portion] / Dr Bank [portion] / Dr Wallet [portion] / Dr Accounts Receivable [credit portion] / Cr Sales Revenue [total amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by total quantity sold at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Apply VAT treatment uniformly to total sale value once VAT status is confirmed
clarification_questions: Exact split kati-kati ho cash, bank, wallet, credit ma?
example_user_inputs: 55000 ko sale half cash half credit
aja bikri cash 8000 bank 5000 esewa 2000 credit 3500
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: mixed_payment_sale, debit: [Cash, Bank, Wallet, Accounts Receivable], credit: [Sales Revenue], amount: 18500, clarification_needed: true}

simple_meaning_en: Income earned from providing a service such as repair, salon, or transport, generally with no inventory effect except consumed parts
simple_meaning_np: मर्मत, सैलून, ढुवानी जस्ता सेवा प्रदान गरेर आम्दानी हुने
english_examples: Charged Rs.1500 for a repair service
Collected Rs.500 for a haircut
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Wallet/Receivable [amount] / Cr Service Income [amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory only for any spare parts or consumables physically used during the service
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm VAT applicability for services, which may differ from goods under current VAT Act provisions
clarification_questions: Kunai part/consumable use bhayo ki matra labor charge ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: service_sale, debit: [Cash/Bank], credit: [Service Income], amount: 1500, inventory_effect: reduce_if_parts_used}

simple_meaning_en: A customer returns previously sold goods, reversing part or all of the original sale
simple_meaning_np: ग्राहकले पहिले किनेको सामान फिर्ता गर्ने, बिक्री आंशिक वा पूर्ण रूपमा उल्ट्याइने
english_examples: Customer returned goods worth Rs.1200
Sales return of Rs.800 processed
journal_entry_rule: Dr Sales Revenue [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank/Accounts Receivable [amount]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory by returned quantity at cost, unless goods are damaged/unsellable in which case route to inventory write-off
tax_rule_placeholder: If original sale had VAT, the return should reduce VAT Payable proportionally per current VAT Act provisions on credit notes
clarification_questions: Original sale cash ho ki credit ho?
Goods resellable condition ma cha ki damaged?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: sales_return, debit: [Sales Revenue], credit: [Cash/Bank/Accounts Receivable], amount: 1200, inventory_effect: increase_if_resellable}

simple_meaning_en: A reduction given to the customer off the original sale price at the point of sale
simple_meaning_np: बिक्रीको समयमा ग्राहकलाई दिइने मूल्य छुट
english_examples: Sold after giving a discount to customer
Applied 20% discount on summer collection
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [net amount] / Dr Discount Allowed [discount amount, if tracked separately] / Cr Sales Revenue [gross amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by quantity sold at cost, unaffected by discount
tax_rule_placeholder: VAT, if applicable, should generally be calculated on the net (post-discount) price per standard practice; confirm with CA
clarification_questions: Original price kati thiyo ra discount kati diyeko ho?
Final net amount kati bhayo?
example_user_inputs: 6000 ko cash ma tara discount 200 diyeko
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: cash_sale_with_discount, debit: [Cash], credit: [Sales Revenue], amount: 5800, notes: discount_200_applied}

simple_meaning_en: Goods given away free of charge for promotional purposes, no revenue recorded
simple_meaning_np: प्रचारको लागि नि:शुल्क दिइने सामान, कुनै आम्दानी दर्ता नहुने
romanized_examples: customer lai free sample diyeko 2 piece
promotion ko lagi free ma diye
english_examples: Gave 2 free sample units to a customer
Distributed free samples for promotion
journal_entry_rule: Dr Advertisement/Promotion Expense [cost value] / Cr Inventory [cost value]; no Sales Revenue recorded
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by quantity given away at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Free samples may have specific VAT treatment (deemed supply) under VAT Act; confirm with CA before finalizing
clarification_questions: Kati quantity ra cost value kati ho sample ko?
example_user_inputs: customer lai free sample diyeko 2 piece
promotion ko lagi free ma diye 5 piece
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: free_sample, debit: [Advertisement Expense], credit: [Inventory], amount: cost_value, revenue_impact: none}

simple_meaning_en: Sale of goods at a reduced price because they are damaged or defective
simple_meaning_np: बिग्रेको वा खराब भएको सामान घटाइएको मूल्यमा बेचिने
romanized_examples: damaged item half price ma diye
english_examples: Sold damaged stock at a reduced price
Sold defective items at half price
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [reduced amount] / Cr Sales Revenue [reduced amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by quantity sold at original cost, which may create a lower gross margin or loss on this line
tax_rule_placeholder: VAT, if applicable, is charged on the actual reduced sale price, not the original price
clarification_questions: Reduced price kati ho, ra original cost kati thiyo?
example_user_inputs: kharab maal sasto ma becheko 500 ma
damaged item half price ma diye
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: damaged_goods_sale, debit: [Cash], credit: [Sales Revenue], amount: 500, inventory_effect: reduce_at_original_cost}

simple_meaning_en: Sale of waste material, damaged packaging, or unusable stock at scrap value
simple_meaning_np: खराब पोका, कबाड वा प्रयोग नहुने सामान स्क्र्याप मूल्यमा बेचिने
english_examples: Sold scrap material for Rs.600
Sold old cartons to a scrap dealer
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [amount] / Cr Scrap Sales [amount]
inventory_rule: Remove any residual book value of the scrapped item from Inventory if it was still carried at a value
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm whether scrap sales attract VAT under current provisions
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: scrap_sale, debit: [Cash], credit: [Scrap Sales], amount: 600}

simple_meaning_en: Money received from a customer before goods or services are delivered, an unearned revenue liability
simple_meaning_np: सामान वा सेवा दिनु अगावै ग्राहकबाट प्राप्त हुने रकम, अर्जित नभएको आम्दानी दायित्व
romanized_examples: advance liyeko customer bata order confirm garna
english_examples: Received advance payment of Rs.3000 for future order
Took Rs.5000 booking token from customer
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Wallet [amount] / Cr Advance Received (Customer) [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect until goods are actually delivered
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm whether VAT liability arises at the time of advance receipt or only at delivery, per current VAT Act treatment
clarification_questions: Kun customer bata ho, ra kunbata (cash/bank/wallet) received bhayo?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: customer_advance, debit: [Cash/Bank/Wallet], credit: [Advance Received], amount: 5000}

simple_meaning_en: Full collection of a previously outstanding receivable from a customer
simple_meaning_np: ग्राहकबाट पहिलेको बाँकी रकम पूरै असुल हुने
english_examples: Received full outstanding payment from customer
Customer paid off their entire due
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Wallet [amount] / Cr Accounts Receivable [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable — VAT was already recognized at the time of original sale
clarification_questions: Kun customer ho, ra kunbata (cash/bank/wallet) tireko ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: customer_payment_collection, debit: [Cash/Bank], credit: [Accounts Receivable], amount: 5000}

simple_meaning_en: Collection of only part of a customer's outstanding due, with a remaining balance still owed
simple_meaning_np: ग्राहकको बाँकी रकम मध्ये आंशिक रकम मात्र असुल हुने, बाँकी अझै रहने
english_examples: Received partial payment of Rs.2000 against Rs.5000 due
Customer paid half of the outstanding amount
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Wallet [amount received] / Cr Accounts Receivable [amount received]; remaining balance stays on Accounts Receivable
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable — VAT was already recognized at the time of original sale
clarification_questions: Kul rakam kati thiyo ra aaja kati tireko ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: partial_payment, debit: [Cash], credit: [Accounts Receivable], amount: 2000, clarification_needed: true}

simple_meaning_en: Writing off a customer's receivable as permanently uncollectible
simple_meaning_np: ग्राहकको बाँकी रकम असुल नहुने भनेर स्थायी रूपमा खारेज गर्ने
romanized_examples: customer ko baki asul hune chaina write off garne
english_examples: Writing off customer's due as bad debt
Customer's credit balance is uncollectible
journal_entry_rule: Dr Bad Debt Expense [amount] / Cr Accounts Receivable [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm whether bad debt is deductible for income tax purposes under current Income Tax Act provisions
clarification_questions: Yo confirm garna aghi, sabai collection effort try gareko cha? Owner le explicitly confirm garcha yo write off garne?
example_user_inputs: customer ko baki asul hune chaina write off garne
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: bad_debt_writeoff, debit: [Bad Debt Expense], credit: [Accounts Receivable], amount: 3000, requires_explicit_confirmation: true}

simple_meaning_en: Goods or materials bought and paid for immediately in cash, bank, or wallet
simple_meaning_np: सामान वा कच्चा पदार्थ किनेर तुरुन्तै नगद, बैंक वा वालेटबाट भुक्तानी गरिने
english_examples: Purchased goods for Rs.5000 cash
Bought inventory paying by bank
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory by quantity purchased at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm if bill is a valid VAT invoice to determine if Input VAT can be recorded separately
clarification_questions: Kun supplier bata kineko ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: cash_purchase, debit: [Inventory], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 5000, inventory_effect: increase}

simple_meaning_en: Goods bought from a supplier without immediate payment, creating a payable
simple_meaning_np: सप्लायरबाट उधारोमा सामान किनिने, तिर्नुपर्ने दायित्व सिर्जना हुने
english_examples: Purchased inventory worth Rs.25000 on credit
Bought goods from supplier on credit terms
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory [amount] / Cr Accounts Payable (Supplier) [amount]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory by quantity purchased at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm if bill is a valid VAT invoice with supplier PAN before recording Input VAT
clarification_questions: Kun supplier bata kineko ho, ra VAT bill cha ki chaina?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: credit_purchase, debit: [Inventory], credit: [Accounts Payable], amount: 25000, inventory_effect: increase}

simple_meaning_en: A purchase supported by a valid VAT invoice, allowing input VAT to be claimed
simple_meaning_np: मान्य भ्याट बिल सहितको खरिद, इनपुट भ्याट दाबी गर्न मिल्ने
romanized_examples: vat lageko bill ma kharid gareko
english_examples: Purchased with a valid VAT invoice
Bought goods with VAT included on the bill
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory [net amount] / Dr VAT Receivable (Input VAT) [VAT amount] / Cr Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable [gross amount]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory by quantity purchased at net (pre-VAT) cost
tax_rule_placeholder: VAT rate and eligibility for input credit must be confirmed against current VAT Act and IRD Nepal rules
clarification_questions: Bill ma supplier ko VAT registration number cha ki chaina?
example_user_inputs: vat lageko bill ma kharid gareko
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: vat_purchase, debit: [Inventory, VAT Receivable], credit: [Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable], amount: 11300, tax_effect: rate_pending_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: A purchase with only a plain PAN bill, no VAT charged and no input VAT claimable
simple_meaning_np: पान बिल मात्र भएको खरिद, भ्याट नलागिने र इनपुट भ्याट दाबी गर्न नमिल्ने
romanized_examples: pan bill matra cha vat xaina
english_examples: This bill has only PAN, no VAT
Non-VAT purchase of goods
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory [full amount] / Cr Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable [full amount]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory by quantity purchased at full invoice cost
tax_rule_placeholder: No Input VAT recorded since the bill is not a valid VAT invoice
example_user_inputs: pan bill matra cha vat xaina
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: non_vat_purchase, debit: [Inventory], credit: [Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable], amount: 6000, tax_effect: no_input_vat}

simple_meaning_en: Goods or machinery purchased from a foreign supplier, potentially subject to customs duty and other import charges
simple_meaning_np: विदेशी सप्लायरबाट किनिने सामान वा मेसिनरी, भन्सार महसुल तथा अन्य आयात शुल्क लाग्न सक्ने
romanized_examples: china bata machine import gareko customs sahit
english_examples: Imported machinery from China with customs duty
Goods arrived from an Indian supplier
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory/Fixed Asset [base cost + customs duty + import charges] / Cr Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable [total amount]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory or Fixed Assets at landed cost including all import charges
tax_rule_placeholder: Customs duty, VAT on import, and any excise must be confirmed from Customs Department and IRD Nepal current rates
clarification_questions: Customs duty ra other import charges alag cha ki total ma include cha?
Exchange rate kati use gareko ho?
example_user_inputs: china bata machine import gareko customs sahit 800000
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: import_purchase, debit: [Inventory/Fixed Asset], credit: [Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable], amount: pending_landed_cost_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: Goods previously purchased are returned to the supplier, reducing the payable or receiving a refund
simple_meaning_np: पहिले किनेको सामान सप्लायरलाई फिर्ता गरिने, तिर्नुपर्ने रकम घटाइने वा फिर्ता पैसा पाइने
english_examples: Returned defective goods to supplier
Purchase return of Rs.1500 worth of goods
journal_entry_rule: Dr Accounts Payable [amount] / Cr Purchase Return [amount]; if already paid, Dr Cash/Bank instead
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by returned quantity at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: If original purchase had Input VAT claimed, the return should reduce that Input VAT claim per current rules
clarification_questions: Yo purchase already paid vaisakeko thiyo ki still payable ma cha?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: purchase_return, debit: [Accounts Payable], credit: [Purchase Return], amount: 1500, inventory_effect: reduce}

simple_meaning_en: A reduction in the purchase price given by the supplier, either at the time of purchase or as a later rebate
simple_meaning_np: सप्लायरले खरिद मूल्यमा दिने छुट, खरिदको समयमा वा पछि रिबेटको रूपमा
english_examples: Supplier gave a discount of Rs.500
Received a purchase discount
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory/Accounts Payable [net amount after discount] / Cr Discount Received [discount amount, if tracked separately] / Cr Cash/Bank [net amount paid]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory at net cost after discount
tax_rule_placeholder: VAT, if applicable, is typically calculated on the discounted (net) purchase price
clarification_questions: Original price kati thiyo ra discount kati paye?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: purchase_discount, debit: [Inventory], credit: [Discount Received, Cash/Bank], amount: net_after_discount}

simple_meaning_en: Full payment made to a supplier to clear an outstanding accounts payable balance
simple_meaning_np: सप्लायरको बाँकी दायित्व पूर्ण रूपमा चुक्ता गर्न गरिने भुक्तानी
english_examples: Paid supplier Rs.15000 through bank
Cleared supplier's full outstanding balance
journal_entry_rule: Dr Accounts Payable [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable — Input VAT was already recognized at time of purchase; confirm any TDS withholding requirements for this payment type
clarification_questions: Kun supplier lai ra kunbata (cash/bank) tireko ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: supplier_payment, debit: [Accounts Payable], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 15000}

simple_meaning_en: Only part of a supplier's outstanding due is paid, with a balance still remaining owed
simple_meaning_np: सप्लायरको बाँकी मध्ये आंशिक रकम मात्र तिरिने, बाँकी अझै रहने
english_examples: Paid Rs.12000 partial payment to supplier out of Rs.20000 due
Cleared half of supplier's outstanding balance
journal_entry_rule: Dr Accounts Payable [amount paid] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount paid]; remaining balance stays on Accounts Payable
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable to the payment itself
clarification_questions: Kul baki rakam kati thiyo ra aaja kati tireko ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: partial_supplier_payment, debit: [Accounts Payable], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 12000, clarification_needed: true}

simple_meaning_en: Money paid to a supplier before the goods are actually received
simple_meaning_np: सामान प्राप्त हुनु अगावै सप्लायरलाई तिरिने रकम
english_examples: Paid Rs.50000 advance to supplier before goods arrive
Gave advance payment before receiving delivery
journal_entry_rule: Dr Advance to Supplier [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect until goods actually arrive, at which point Advance to Supplier is cleared against Inventory/Accounts Payable
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable until goods/bill are received
clarification_questions: Kun supplier lai ra kunbata (cash/bank) diyeko ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: advance_to_supplier, debit: [Advance to Supplier], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 50000}

simple_meaning_en: Transport cost paid to bring purchased goods into the shop or warehouse, added to the cost of inventory
simple_meaning_np: किनेको सामान पसल वा गोदाममा भित्र्याउन तिरिने ढुवानी खर्च, मौज्दातको लागतमा थपिने
english_examples: Paid Rs.3500 transport cost to bring in goods
Freight expense for incoming stock
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory (added to cost) or Freight Inward [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: Freight cost is capitalized into the cost of the goods received, increasing per-unit cost of Inventory
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm if transport service invoice carries VAT that can be claimed as input
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: freight_inward, debit: [Inventory/Freight Inward], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 3500}

simple_meaning_en: Labor charges paid for loading or unloading purchased goods, typically added to inventory cost
simple_meaning_np: किनेको सामान लोड/अनलोड गर्न तिरिने ज्याला, सामान्यतया मौज्दातको लागतमा थपिने
english_examples: Paid Rs.300 for loading/unloading charges
Labor cost for unloading the delivery truck
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory (added to cost) [amount] / Cr Cash [amount]
inventory_rule: Loading/unloading cost is capitalized into the cost of the goods received
tax_rule_placeholder: Generally a labor charge without VAT, but confirm if an invoice is issued by a formal labor contractor
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: loading_unloading_charge, debit: [Inventory], credit: [Cash], amount: 300}

simple_meaning_en: Goods physically received into stock but no formal invoice or bill has been provided by the supplier yet
simple_meaning_np: सामान भौतिक रूपमा प्राप्त भएको तर सप्लायरले अझै औपचारिक बिल नदिएको
english_examples: Goods received but no bill yet
Received delivery without an invoice
journal_entry_rule: Provisional: Dr Inventory [estimated amount] / Cr Accounts Payable [estimated amount]; update with actual figures once bill arrives
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory at estimated cost as a provisional entry, requiring later reconciliation against the actual bill
tax_rule_placeholder: Input VAT cannot be claimed until a valid VAT invoice is received
clarification_questions: Maal ko estimated value kati ho, ra bill kahile aaune expected cha?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: purchase_without_bill, debit: [Inventory], credit: [Accounts Payable], amount: estimated_pending_confirmation, status: provisional}

simple_meaning_en: A purchase supported only by an informal handwritten receipt rather than a printed or system-generated invoice

inventory_rule: No inventory effect

clarification_questions: Cash ma ho ki bank bata halya?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: owner_capital_injection, debit: [Cash/Bank], credit: [Owner's Capital], amount: 100000}

simple_meaning_en: The owner takes money out of the business for personal use, not a business expense
simple_meaning_np: मालिकले व्यक्तिगत प्रयोगको लागि व्यवसायबाट पैसा झिकिने, यो व्यावसायिक खर्च होइन
english_examples: Owner withdrew Rs.5000 for personal use
Owner took money out of the shop
journal_entry_rule: Dr Drawings [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable — this reduces owner's equity, not a business expense
clarification_questions: Cash ma ho ki bank bata liyeko?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: owner_drawings, debit: [Drawings], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 5000}

simple_meaning_en: An unexplained deficit found when the physical cash count is less than what the records show
simple_meaning_np: भौतिक नगद गन्ती गर्दा रेकर्डमा भएको भन्दा कम भेटिने अस्पष्ट कमी
romanized_examples: cash counter tally garda 200 kam dekhiyo
english_examples: Found Rs.200 short when tallying cash
Till was short by Rs.300 at closing
journal_entry_rule: After reasonable investigation, if unresolved: Dr Miscellaneous Expense (Cash Shortage) [amount] / Cr Cash in Hand [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable
clarification_questions: Aajako sabai transaction pheri check gari shortage ko source pahichan garnu hola pahile posting garna
example_user_inputs: cash counter tally garda 200 kam dekhiyo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: cash_shortage, debit: [Miscellaneous Expense], credit: [Cash in Hand], amount: 200, requires_investigation_first: true}

simple_meaning_en: An unexplained surplus found when the physical cash count is more than what the records show
simple_meaning_np: भौतिक नगद गन्ती गर्दा रेकर्डमा भएको भन्दा बढी भेटिने अस्पष्ट अधिक्य
romanized_examples: cash counter tally garda 200 extra dekhiyo
english_examples: Found Rs.200 extra when tallying cash
Till had Rs.700 surplus at closing
journal_entry_rule: After reasonable investigation, if unresolved: Dr Cash in Hand [amount] / Cr Miscellaneous/Other Income [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable
clarification_questions: Aajako sabai transaction pheri check gari surplus ko source pahichan garnu hola pahile posting garna
example_user_inputs: cash counter tally garda 200 extra dekhiyo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: cash_excess, debit: [Cash in Hand], credit: [Miscellaneous/Other Income], amount: 200, requires_investigation_first: true}

simple_meaning_en: The value of inventory on hand at the start of an accounting period
simple_meaning_np: लेखा अवधि सुरु हुँदाको मौज्दातको मूल्य
romanized_examples: opening stock set garne naya fiscal year ko lagi
english_examples: Set opening stock value of Rs.500000
Recorded beginning inventory for new fiscal year
journal_entry_rule: Dr Opening Stock [amount] as part of COGS calculation; typically set once per fiscal year rather than a routine journal entry
inventory_rule: Establishes the starting inventory balance for the period
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable directly, though closing stock valuation method affects taxable profit
clarification_questions: Fiscal year kun mitibata suru huncha (Shrawan 1 typically)?
example_user_inputs: opening stock set garne naya fiscal year ko lagi
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: opening_stock_setup, amount: 500000, period_start: fiscal_year_start}

simple_meaning_en: The value of inventory remaining unsold at the end of an accounting period
simple_meaning_np: लेखा अवधि सकिँदा नबिक्री रहेको मौज्दातको मूल्य
romanized_examples: year end ko closing stock value
english_examples: Closing stock counted at Rs.300000
Year-end closing inventory value
journal_entry_rule: Dr Closing Stock (as Inventory asset) / Cr Closing Stock Adjustment (reducing COGS); typically a period-end calculated entry
inventory_rule: Establishes the ending inventory balance carried into the next period as opening stock
tax_rule_placeholder: Inventory valuation method (FIFO, weighted average, etc.) affects taxable profit; confirm consistent method usage with CA
clarification_questions: Physical stock count vaisakeko cha?
example_user_inputs: year end ko closing stock value 300000
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: closing_stock_setup, amount: 300000, period_end: fiscal_year_end}

simple_meaning_en: A positive correction to inventory records, for example after finding more physical stock than the system shows
simple_meaning_np: मौज्दात रेकर्डमा सकारात्मक सुधार, जस्तै प्रणालीमा भन्दा बढी भौतिक स्टक भेटिएको बेला
romanized_examples: stock count garda system bhanda 20 unit badi cha
english_examples: Physical count shows 20 more units than system
Found extra stock during counting
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory [value] / Cr Miscellaneous/Other Income [value] (after investigation confirms genuine surplus)
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory quantity and value
tax_rule_placeholder: Unexplained inventory gains may need review for correct income recognition
clarification_questions: Extra stock ko source pata lagayeko cha ki chaina, confirm garna investigation garnu hola
example_user_inputs: stock count garda system bhanda 20 unit badi cha
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: stock_adjustment_increase, debit: [Inventory], credit: [Other Income], requires_investigation_first: true}

simple_meaning_en: A negative correction to inventory records, for example after finding less physical stock than the system shows
simple_meaning_np: मौज्दात रेकर्डमा नकारात्मक सुधार, जस्तै प्रणालीमा भन्दा कम भौतिक स्टक भेटिएको बेला
romanized_examples: stock count garda 5 piece missing dekhiyo
english_examples: Stock take showed 5 pieces missing
Physical stock is less than system records
journal_entry_rule: Dr Miscellaneous/Inventory Shrinkage Expense [value] / Cr Inventory [value] (after investigation)
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory quantity and value
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm deductibility of inventory shrinkage losses under current Income Tax Act provisions
clarification_questions: Missing stock ko cost value kati ho, ra karan pata lagayeko cha ki chaina?
example_user_inputs: stock count garda 5 piece missing dekhiyo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: stock_adjustment_decrease, debit: [Inventory Shrinkage Expense], credit: [Inventory], requires_investigation_first: true}

simple_meaning_en: Inventory that has become unsellable due to physical damage, requiring write-off
simple_meaning_np: भौतिक रूपमा बिग्रिएर बिक्री गर्न नमिल्ने भएको मौज्दात, खारेज गर्नुपर्ने
romanized_examples: fridge bigriyo maal chiso nabhayera bigriyo
english_examples: Goods damaged, loss of Rs.900
Stock spoiled because the fridge broke
journal_entry_rule: Dr Miscellaneous/Inventory Loss Expense [value] / Cr Inventory [value]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by the damaged quantity at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm deductibility of damaged stock write-offs under current Income Tax Act provisions
clarification_questions: Kati quantity ra value ko maal kharab bhayo?
example_user_inputs: fridge bigriyo maal chiso nabhayera bigriyo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: damaged_stock_writeoff, debit: [Inventory Loss Expense], credit: [Inventory], amount: 900}

simple_meaning_en: Inventory, typically perishable or medicine, that has passed its expiry date and must be written off
simple_meaning_np: सामान्यतया चलनचल्तीका वा औषधि जस्ता मौज्दात जसको म्याद सकिएको हुन्छ र खारेज गर्नुपर्ने
english_examples: 5 boxes of expired medicine wasted
Medicine expired, needs write-off
journal_entry_rule: Dr Miscellaneous/Inventory Loss Expense [value] / Cr Inventory [value]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by the expired quantity at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm deductibility of expired stock write-offs, and whether any regulatory disposal requirements apply for pharmaceuticals
clarification_questions: Kati quantity ra value ko expired medicine ho, batch number confirm garnu hola
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: expired_stock_writeoff, debit: [Inventory Loss Expense], credit: [Inventory], amount: pending_value_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: Inventory that has disappeared due to theft or loss, requiring a write-off
simple_meaning_np: चोरी वा हराएको कारणले हराएको मौज्दात, खारेज गर्नुपर्ने
english_examples: Thief stole Rs.20000 worth of goods
Stock is missing, cause unknown
journal_entry_rule: Dr Miscellaneous/Theft Loss Expense [value] / Cr Inventory [value]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory by the stolen/lost quantity at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm deductibility of theft losses and interaction with any insurance claim recovery under current tax rules
clarification_questions: Police report file bhayeko cha? Insurance claim garne planning cha?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: theft_loss, debit: [Theft Loss Expense], credit: [Inventory], amount: 20000}

simple_meaning_en: Inventory moved from one branch or location to another within the same business, not a sale
simple_meaning_np: एउटै व्यवसाय भित्र एक शाखा वा स्थानबाट अर्को स्थानमा मौज्दात सारिने, बिक्री नभएको
romanized_examples: branch bata head office ma stock transfer gareko 50000
godown bata pasal ma maal sarya
english_examples: Transferred Rs.50000 worth of stock from branch to head office
Moved goods from warehouse to shop
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory (Destination) [value] / Cr Inventory (Source) [value]; no revenue or expense impact
inventory_rule: No net change in total inventory, only relocation between tracked locations
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm if inter-branch transfers require any documentation under VAT Act if branches are separately registered
clarification_questions: Branches eutai company ko ho ki separate legal entity ho?
example_user_inputs: branch bata head office ma stock transfer gareko 50000
godown bata pasal ma maal sarya
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: inter_branch_stock_transfer, debit: [Inventory - Destination], credit: [Inventory - Source], amount: 50000}

simple_meaning_en: Converting inventory recorded in one unit of measure into another, such as bags into kilograms
simple_meaning_np: मौज्दातलाई एक इकाईबाट अर्को इकाईमा रूपान्तरण गर्ने, जस्तै बोरालाई किलोग्राममा
romanized_examples: 50 kg chamal 1 bora ma convert gareko
bulk stock lai retail unit ma todeko
english_examples: Converted 50 kg of rice into 1 bag unit
Broke down bulk stock into retail units
journal_entry_rule: No monetary journal entry typically required; this is a quantity/unit-of-measure adjustment within Inventory records
inventory_rule: Total inventory value remains the same; only the unit of measure and quantity representation changes
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable
clarification_questions: Conversion ratio kati ho (jasto 1 bora = kati kg)?
example_user_inputs: 50 kg chamal 1 bora ma convert gareko
bulk stock lai retail unit ma todeko
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: unit_conversion, value_impact: none, quantity_recalculated: true}

simple_meaning_en: Extra stock given by a supplier at no additional cost, alongside a regular purchase
simple_meaning_np: नियमित खरिदसँगै सप्लायरले कुनै थप शुल्क नलिई दिने अतिरिक्त मौज्दात
romanized_examples: supplier le bonus stock diyo free ma 10 piece extra
english_examples: Supplier gave 10 extra pieces free with the order
Received free promotional stock from supplier
journal_entry_rule: No additional debit/credit entry for the free units themselves; effectively reduces the average unit cost of the total purchased quantity
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory quantity at zero incremental cost, reducing weighted average cost per unit
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm if free goods received have any specific VAT treatment as a deemed benefit
clarification_questions: Yo kunai purchase order sanga bundled cha?
example_user_inputs: supplier le bonus stock diyo free ma 10 piece extra
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: free_stock_receipt, inventory_effect: increase_at_zero_incremental_cost}

simple_meaning_en: Extra goods given to a customer as a promotional bonus alongside their purchase, such as buy-one-get-one offers
simple_meaning_np: किनमेलसँगै ग्राहकलाई प्रचारात्मक बोनसको रूपमा दिइने अतिरिक्त सामान, जस्तै एक किन्दा एक फ्री अफर
romanized_examples: buy one get one free garya
english_examples: Ran a buy-one-get-one-free offer
Gave a bonus item to the customer
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [paid amount] / Cr Sales Revenue [paid amount]; reduce Inventory for both the paid and bonus items given
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory for the total quantity given away (paid item plus bonus item) at cost
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm VAT treatment for promotional bonus goods under current rules
clarification_questions: Paid item ko price kati thiyo, ra bonus item ko cost value track garne ho?
example_user_inputs: buy one get one free garya
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: bonus_goods_promotion, debit: [Cash], credit: [Sales Revenue], inventory_effect: reduce_both_items}

simple_meaning_en: Raw material taken from inventory and used in the production process
simple_meaning_np: उत्पादन प्रक्रियामा प्रयोग गरिने कच्चा पदार्थ मौज्दातबाट झिकिने
romanized_examples: raw material use gareko production ma 15000 ko
kaccha maal khard bhayo utpadan ma
english_examples: Used Rs.15000 worth of raw material in production
Raw material consumed in manufacturing
journal_entry_rule: Dr Work-in-Progress or Cost of Goods Sold [value] / Cr Raw Material Inventory [value]
inventory_rule: Reduce Raw Material Inventory; increase Work-in-Progress or Finished Goods Inventory correspondingly
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable directly; affects cost basis used in COGS for tax reporting
clarification_questions: Yo kun product batch ko lagi consumption ho?
example_user_inputs: raw material use gareko production ma 15000 ko
kaccha maal khard bhayo utpadan ma
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: manufacturing_consumption, debit: [Work-in-Progress], credit: [Raw Material Inventory], amount: 15000}

simple_meaning_en: Completed products moved from work-in-progress into finished goods inventory ready for sale
simple_meaning_np: उत्पादन प्रक्रिया पूरा भएर तयार सामान बिक्रीको लागि तयार मौज्दातमा सारिने
romanized_examples: 200 unit product banayeko cost track garne
english_examples: Produced 200 units, need to record cost
Moved finished products into warehouse
journal_entry_rule: Dr Finished Goods Inventory [total cost] / Cr Work-in-Progress [total cost]
inventory_rule: Increase Finished Goods Inventory by completed units at total production cost (raw material plus direct labor plus overhead)
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable directly; affects cost basis used in COGS for tax reporting
clarification_questions: Raw material, direct labor, ra overhead ko total cost breakdown kati ho yo batch ko lagi?
example_user_inputs: 200 unit product banayeko cost track garne
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: finished_goods_production, debit: [Finished Goods Inventory], credit: [Work-in-Progress], amount: pending_cost_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: Acquisition of a long-term item such as furniture, equipment, vehicle, or machinery for business use
simple_meaning_np: फर्निचर, उपकरण, सवारी वा मेसिनरी जस्ता लामो अवधिसम्म प्रयोग हुने सामान व्यावसायिक प्रयोगको लागि खरिद गरिने
english_examples: Purchased furniture worth Rs.18000
Bought a computer for the office
journal_entry_rule: Dr [specific Fixed Asset account] [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable [amount]
inventory_rule: No effect on trade Inventory; this is a capital asset addition, not resale stock
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm applicable depreciation rate category under current Income Tax Act rules for tax purposes
clarification_questions: Cash, bank, vaya credit ma kineko ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: fixed_asset_purchase, debit: [Furniture/Computer/Vehicle/Machinery], credit: [Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable], amount: 18000}

simple_meaning_en: Disposal of a fixed asset, potentially resulting in a gain or loss compared to its book value
simple_meaning_np: स्थिर सम्पत्ति बिक्री गरिने, बुक भ्यालुको तुलनामा नाफा वा नोक्सान हुन सक्ने
english_examples: Sold old vehicle for Rs.200000
Sold an old machine
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [sale amount] / Dr Accumulated Depreciation [amount] / Cr Fixed Asset [original cost] / Cr or Dr Gain/Loss on Disposal [difference]
inventory_rule: No effect on trade Inventory
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm tax treatment of gain/loss on asset disposal under current Income Tax Act provisions
clarification_questions: Asset ko original cost ra accumulated depreciation kati ho?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: fixed_asset_disposal, debit: [Cash/Bank, Accumulated Depreciation], credit: [Fixed Asset, Gain on Disposal], amount: 200000}

simple_meaning_en: The periodic charge representing the wear and use of a fixed asset over time
simple_meaning_np: समयसँगै स्थिर सम्पत्तिको उपयोग र क्षयलाई प्रतिनिधित्व गर्ने आवधिक शुल्क
romanized_examples: depreciation calculate garna paryo year end aayo
english_examples: Need to calculate depreciation, year end has come
Calculate depreciation for the machine
journal_entry_rule: Dr Depreciation Expense [amount] / Cr Accumulated Depreciation [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm applicable depreciation rate/method under current Income Tax Act rules, which may differ from accounting depreciation for tax purposes
clarification_questions: Kun fixed assets ko depreciation calculate garne ho, ra method/rate ke prayog garne ho?
example_user_inputs: depreciation calculate garna paryo year end aayo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: depreciation_charge, debit: [Depreciation Expense], credit: [Accumulated Depreciation], amount: pending_calculation}

simple_meaning_en: Funds borrowed from a bank, cooperative, or individual, creating a liability to repay
simple_meaning_np: बैंक, सहकारी वा व्यक्तिबाट लिइने ऋण, फिर्ता तिर्नुपर्ने दायित्व सिर्जना हुने
english_examples: Took a loan of Rs.50000 from bank
Borrowed money from a moneylender
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [amount] / Cr Loan Payable [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm any withholding requirements on interest to be paid on this loan later
clarification_questions: Kun bank/sahu bata loan liyeko ho ra cash vaya bank ma aayo?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: loan_receipt, debit: [Cash/Bank], credit: [Loan Payable], amount: 50000}

simple_meaning_en: Payment made to reduce the outstanding principal balance of a loan, which may also include an interest component
simple_meaning_np: ऋणको बाँकी मूलधन घटाउन गरिने भुक्तानी, जसमा ब्याज अंश पनि समावेश हुन सक्ने
english_examples: Paid loan installment of Rs.5000 including interest
Paid EMI for the loan
journal_entry_rule: Dr Loan Payable [principal portion] / Dr Interest Expense [interest portion] / Cr Cash/Bank [total amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm interest deductibility limits under current Income Tax Act provisions
clarification_questions: Kati principal ra kati interest cha yo installment ma?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: loan_repayment, debit: [Loan Payable, Interest Expense], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 5000, clarification_needed: true}

simple_meaning_en: Interest that has built up on a loan but has not yet been actually paid, recorded as a liability
simple_meaning_np: ऋणमा जम्मा भएको तर अझै तिरिनसकेको ब्याज, दायित्वको रूपमा दर्ता हुने
romanized_examples: byaj baki cha aile samma tireko chaina
english_examples: Interest is due but not yet paid
Interest has accrued on the loan
journal_entry_rule: Dr Interest Expense [amount] / Cr Interest Payable [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm timing of interest deductibility (accrual vs cash basis) under current Income Tax Act provisions
example_user_inputs: byaj baki cha aile samma tireko chaina
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: interest_accrual, debit: [Interest Expense], credit: [Interest Payable], amount: 500}

simple_meaning_en: A refundable deposit paid by the business to a landlord or service provider
simple_meaning_np: व्यवसायले घरबेटी वा सेवा प्रदायकलाई तिरेको फिर्ता हुने धरौटी
english_examples: Paid Rs.10000 rental security deposit
Gave a deposit to the landlord
journal_entry_rule: Dr Security Deposit (Given) [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable — this is a refundable asset, not an expense
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: security_deposit_given, debit: [Security Deposit], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 10000}

simple_meaning_en: A refundable deposit received by the business from a customer or tenant
simple_meaning_np: व्यवसायले ग्राहक वा भाडावालाबाट प्राप्त गरेको फिर्ता हुने धरौटी
romanized_examples: customer bata deposit liyeko rental ko lagi
english_examples: Received a rental deposit from customer
Took a deposit from tenant
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [amount] / Cr Security Deposit (Received) [liability account] [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable — this is a refundable liability, not income
example_user_inputs: customer bata deposit liyeko rental ko lagi 5000
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: security_deposit_received, debit: [Cash/Bank], credit: [Security Deposit Liability], amount: 5000}

simple_meaning_en: Rent paid in advance covering a future period, treated as a prepaid asset until consumed
simple_meaning_np: भविष्यको अवधि समेट्ने अग्रिम रूपमा तिरिने भाडा, उपयोग नभएसम्म पेश्की सम्पत्तिको रूपमा हुने
romanized_examples: ek saal ko bhada agadi tireko
english_examples: Paid one full year's rent in advance
Paid 2 months' rent advance
journal_entry_rule: Dr Prepaid Expenses [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]; amortize to Rent Expense monthly over the covered period
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm timing of expense deductibility (matching period vs cash paid) under current Income Tax Act provisions
clarification_questions: Kati mahina ko rent cover garcha yo advance le?
example_user_inputs: ek saal ko bhada agadi tireko 96000
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: advance_rent, debit: [Prepaid Expenses], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 96000, amortization: monthly_over_covered_period}

simple_meaning_en: Any expense paid in advance for a future period, other than rent, such as insurance or annual subscriptions
simple_meaning_np: भाडा बाहेक भविष्यको अवधिको लागि अग्रिम तिरिने कुनै खर्च, जस्तै बिमा वा वार्षिक सदस्यता
english_examples: Paid annual insurance premium in advance
Paid yearly software subscription upfront
journal_entry_rule: Dr Prepaid Expenses [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]; amortize to relevant Expense account monthly over the covered period
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm timing of expense deductibility under current Income Tax Act provisions
clarification_questions: Kati mahina/saal ko period cover garcha yo payment le?
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: prepaid_expense, debit: [Prepaid Expenses], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 12000, amortization: monthly_over_covered_period}

simple_meaning_en: VAT charged to a customer on a sale, recorded as a liability owed to the tax authority
simple_meaning_np: ग्राहकबाट बिक्रीमा असुल गरिने भ्याट, कर प्राधिकरणलाई तिर्नुपर्ने दायित्वको रूपमा दर्ता हुने
romanized_examples: output vat calculate garne bikri ko
english_examples: Issued a VAT bill to customer
Calculating output VAT on this sale
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank/Receivable [gross amount] / Cr Sales Revenue [net amount] / Cr VAT Payable [VAT amount]
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory per the underlying sale, per SAL-01/SAL-02 rules
tax_rule_placeholder: Current VAT rate must be confirmed from the latest Finance Act and IRD Nepal before calculation
clarification_questions: Yo business VAT registered ho? Applicable VAT rate confirm garnu hola
example_user_inputs: output vat calculate garne bikri ko
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: vat_output, credit: [VAT Payable], amount: rate_pending_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: VAT paid on a purchase supported by a valid VAT invoice, claimable as a credit against VAT owed
simple_meaning_np: मान्य भ्याट बिल सहित खरिदमा तिरिएको भ्याट, तिर्नुपर्ने भ्याटको विरुद्ध क्रेडिटको रूपमा दाबी गर्न मिल्ने
romanized_examples: input vat claim garna milcha ki mildaina yo bill le
english_examples: Can input VAT be claimed on this bill
VAT-included purchase invoice
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory/Expense [net amount] / Dr VAT Receivable (Input VAT) [VAT amount] / Cr Cash/Bank/Accounts Payable [gross amount]
inventory_rule: Increase Inventory at net (pre-VAT) cost, per PUR-01/PUR-02 rules
tax_rule_placeholder: Bill must be a valid VAT invoice from a VAT-registered supplier; confirm eligibility per current IRD rules before claiming credit
clarification_questions: Bill VAT-registered supplier ko proper VAT invoice format ma cha?
example_user_inputs: input vat claim garna milcha ki mildaina yo bill le
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: vat_input, debit: [VAT Receivable], amount: pending_bill_validity_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: Correction to previously recorded VAT figures, such as offsetting input VAT against output VAT during filing
simple_meaning_np: पहिले दर्ता भएको भ्याट अंकमा सुधार, जस्तै फाइलिंगको समयमा इनपुट भ्याटलाई आउटपुट भ्याटसँग समायोजन गर्ने
romanized_examples: monthly VAT filing garna paryo input output milaune
VAT adjust garne mahina antya ma
english_examples: Need to file monthly VAT, offsetting input and output
Adjusting VAT at month end
journal_entry_rule: Dr VAT Payable [input VAT amount] / Cr VAT Receivable [input VAT amount], netting to determine amount due or refundable
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: VAT filing process and net payable/refundable calculation must follow current IRD Nepal procedures; confirm with CA
clarification_questions: Yo mahina ko total input VAT ra output VAT kati ho?
example_user_inputs: monthly VAT filing garna paryo input output milaune
VAT adjust garne mahina antya ma
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: vat_adjustment, debit: [VAT Payable], credit: [VAT Receivable], amount: net_pending_calculation}

simple_meaning_en: A customer has withheld tax at source from a payment owed to the business, reducing the cash actually received
simple_meaning_np: ग्राहकले व्यवसायलाई तिर्नुपर्ने भुक्तानीबाट स्रोतमा कर कट्टा गरेको, वास्तवमा प्राप्त हुने नगद घट्ने
romanized_examples: customer le TDS katera tireko service charge ma
service payment ma TDS deduct bhayo
english_examples: Customer deducted TDS from our service payment
TDS was deducted on the payment received
journal_entry_rule: Dr Cash/Bank [net amount] / Dr TDS Receivable [TDS amount] / Cr Service Income/Sales Revenue [gross amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect unless underlying transaction is a goods sale
tax_rule_placeholder: TDS rate withheld should be confirmed against current Income Tax Act provisions applicable to the service/payment type
clarification_questions: Gross amount kati thiyo ra TDS certificate paunu bhayo?
example_user_inputs: customer le TDS katera tireko service charge ma
service payment ma TDS deduct bhayo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: tds_deducted_by_customer, debit: [Cash/Bank, TDS Receivable], credit: [Service Income], amount: gross_pending_split}

simple_meaning_en: The business withholds tax at source from a payment it makes to a supplier or service provider
simple_meaning_np: व्यवसायले सप्लायर वा सेवा प्रदायकलाई गर्ने भुक्तानीबाट स्रोतमा कर कट्टा गर्ने
romanized_examples: rent tireko landlord lai TDS katera 2000 katya
english_examples: Paid rent to landlord after deducting TDS of Rs.2000
Deducted TDS on professional fee payment
journal_entry_rule: Dr Rent/Professional Fee Expense [gross amount] / Cr TDS Payable [TDS amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [net amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Applicable TDS rate must be confirmed against current Income Tax Act provisions for the specific payment category
clarification_questions: Total gross rakam kati thiyo ra TDS rate kati lagayeko ho?
example_user_inputs: rent tireko landlord lai TDS katera 2000 katya
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: tds_deducted_from_supplier, debit: [Expense], credit: [TDS Payable, Cash/Bank], amount: rate_pending_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: The business deposits previously withheld TDS amounts with the tax authority
simple_meaning_np: व्यवसायले पहिले कट्टा गरेको TDS रकम कर प्राधिकरणमा जम्मा गर्ने
romanized_examples: tax office ma TDS deposit gareko
english_examples: Deposited TDS with tax office
Paid the withheld TDS to IRD
journal_entry_rule: Dr TDS Payable [amount] / Cr Bank Account [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm TDS deposit deadlines and process per current IRD Nepal procedures
example_user_inputs: tax office ma TDS deposit gareko 2000
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: tds_payment, debit: [TDS Payable], credit: [Bank Account], amount: 2000}

simple_meaning_en: Advance payment of estimated annual income tax, typically paid in installments during the fiscal year
simple_meaning_np: वार्षिक आयकरको अनुमानित रकम अग्रिम रूपमा तिरिने, सामान्यतया वित्तीय वर्षभरि किस्तामा तिरिने
romanized_examples: income tax installment tireko yo tirmaash ko
english_examples: Paid this quarter's income tax installment
Deposited advance income tax
journal_entry_rule: Dr Income Tax Advance (Asset) [amount] / Cr Bank Account [amount]; adjusted against final tax liability at year end
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Confirm installment schedule, due dates, and calculation basis per current Income Tax Act provisions with CA
clarification_questions: Kun tirmaash (quarter) ko installment ho ra estimated annual tax kati ho?
example_user_inputs: income tax installment tireko yo tirmaash ko
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: income_tax_installment, debit: [Income Tax Advance], credit: [Bank Account], amount: 15000}

simple_meaning_en: Duty paid on imported goods or on domestically produced excisable goods
simple_meaning_np: आयातित सामान वा घरेलु उत्पादित उत्पाद कर योग्य सामानमा तिरिने महसुल
romanized_examples: customs duty tireko import ko lagi
english_examples: Paid customs duty for imported goods
Paid excise duty on manufactured product
journal_entry_rule: Dr Inventory/Fixed Asset (capitalized as part of landed cost) [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: Customs/excise duty is capitalized into the cost of the imported or manufactured goods
tax_rule_placeholder: Rates and applicability must be confirmed from the Customs Department and Excise Act, which vary by product category and change periodically
clarification_questions: HS code ra applicable duty rate confirm gareko cha?
example_user_inputs: customs duty tireko import ko lagi 45000
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: customs_excise_duty, debit: [Inventory/Fixed Asset], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 45000}

simple_meaning_en: A penalty or fine paid to the tax authority for late filing, late payment, or non-compliance
simple_meaning_np: ढिलो फाइलिंग, ढिलो भुक्तानी वा नियम पालना नगरेको कारण कर प्राधिकरणलाई तिरिने जरिवाना
romanized_examples: late filing ko lagi penalty tireko
english_examples: Paid a penalty for late VAT filing
Tax office imposed a fine
journal_entry_rule: Dr Tax Penalty Expense [amount] / Cr Cash/Bank [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Tax penalties are generally non-deductible for income tax purposes; confirm current treatment with CA
clarification_questions: Penalty ko exact reason ra notice reference ke ho?
example_user_inputs: late filing ko lagi penalty tireko 500
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: tax_penalty, debit: [Tax Penalty Expense], credit: [Cash/Bank], amount: 500, tax_deductibility: generally_non_deductible}

simple_meaning_en: An entry previously posted in error needs to be fully reversed and removed from the books
simple_meaning_np: पहिले गल्तीले पोस्ट भएको इन्ट्री पूर्ण रूपमा उल्ट्याई खातबाट हटाउनुपर्ने
romanized_examples: galti entry gareko thiye reverse garnu paryo
english_examples: Made a wrong entry, need to reverse it
Posted incorrectly, needs correction
journal_entry_rule: Post an exact opposite entry to the original (Dr becomes Cr and vice versa) with a clear reference linking to the original transaction, rather than physically deleting historical records
inventory_rule: Reverse whatever inventory effect the original entry had
tax_rule_placeholder: If the original entry affected VAT or TDS figures already filed, confirm correction procedure with CA before amending filed returns
clarification_questions: Kun original transaction ho, date/amount/reference confirm garnu hola
example_user_inputs: galti entry gareko thiye reverse garnu paryo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: entry_reversal, action: post_opposite_entry, reference: original_transaction_id}

simple_meaning_en: A suspicion or confirmation that the same transaction has been recorded more than once
simple_meaning_np: एउटै कारोबार एकभन्दा बढी पटक दर्ता भएको शंका वा पुष्टि
romanized_examples: duita entry gareko jasto lagcha aja ko sale ko
same bill number ma pheri entry aayo
english_examples: I think I entered today's sale twice
Same bill number appears entered again
journal_entry_rule: Do not post any reversal until the duplicate is confirmed by comparing entry logs, bill numbers, dates, and amounts; upon confirmation, use COR-01 to reverse the duplicate
inventory_rule: If confirmed duplicate involved inventory movement, reverse the duplicated inventory effect as well
tax_rule_placeholder: If duplicate affected already-filed VAT figures, confirm correction procedure with CA
clarification_questions: Kripaya duplicate suspected entries ko date, amount, ra bill number compare gari confirm garnu hola
example_user_inputs: duita entry gareko jasto lagcha aja ko sale ko
same bill number ma pheri entry aayo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: duplicate_check, action: hold_for_verification, status: pending_confirmation}

simple_meaning_en: A request to modify a field (such as amount, party name, or date) on a previously recorded transaction
simple_meaning_np: पहिले दर्ता भएको कारोबारको कुनै फिल्ड (जस्तै रकम, पक्षको नाम वा मिति) संशोधन गर्ने अनुरोध
romanized_examples: yo entry ko amount galat cha thik garne
customer ko naam change garnu paryo transaction ma
english_examples: The amount on this entry is wrong, please fix it
Need to correct the customer name on this transaction
journal_entry_rule: If the amount changes, post an adjusting entry for the difference rather than silently altering historical records, to preserve an audit trail
inventory_rule: If the edit affects quantity or value, adjust Inventory correspondingly
tax_rule_placeholder: If the edit affects a VAT or TDS figure already filed, confirm amendment procedure with CA
clarification_questions: Kun field change garne ho ra sahi value kati ho?
example_user_inputs: yo entry ko amount galat cha thik garne
customer ko naam change garnu paryo transaction ma
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: edit_transaction, action: post_adjusting_entry, reference: transaction_id, field: amount}

simple_meaning_en: A request to remove a previously recorded transaction entirely from the books
simple_meaning_np: पहिले दर्ता भएको कारोबार पूर्ण रूपमा खाताबाट हटाउने अनुरोध
romanized_examples: yo entry delete garnu paryo galat thiyo
english_examples: This entry needs to be deleted, it was wrong
Need to remove this transaction from the system
journal_entry_rule: For audit trail integrity, prefer reversing the entry (COR-01) over physically deleting it, especially once a fiscal period has been closed or reported; true deletion should only be allowed for same-day, unreported entries
inventory_rule: Reverse any inventory effect if the entry is removed or reversed
tax_rule_placeholder: If the transaction has already been included in a filed VAT/tax return, physical deletion is not appropriate — use a formal reversal/amendment process with CA guidance
clarification_questions: Yo transaction kunai already-filed report/return ma include vaisakeko cha ki chaina?
example_user_inputs: yo entry delete garnu paryo galat thiyo
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: delete_request, action: reverse_preferred_over_delete, reference: transaction_id}

simple_meaning_en: Moving an amount from one expense (or other) account to a more appropriate account without changing the total amount
simple_meaning_np: कुल रकम परिवर्तन नगरी एउटा खर्च (वा अन्य) खाताबाट अझ उपयुक्त खातामा रकम सार्ने
romanized_examples: yo kharcha miscellaneous ma galat cha transport ma jane ho
english_examples: This expense is wrongly in miscellaneous, should be transport
Need to change the expense category
journal_entry_rule: Dr [New Expense Account] [amount] / Cr [Old Expense Account] [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect typically, unless reclassifying between inventory-related and non-inventory-related accounts
tax_rule_placeholder: Reclassification among expense categories generally does not change total taxable profit, but confirm if it affects TDS category treatment
clarification_questions: Kun account bata kun account ma sarne ho?
example_user_inputs: yo kharcha miscellaneous ma galat cha transport ma jane ho
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: reclassify_expense, debit: [New Account], credit: [Old Account], amount: unchanged}

simple_meaning_en: Correcting the recorded payment method for a transaction, such as changing it from cash to bank
simple_meaning_np: कारोबारको लागि दर्ता भएको भुक्तानी माध्यम सुधार गर्ने, जस्तै नगदबाट बैंकमा परिवर्तन गर्ने
romanized_examples: yo cash ma post gareko thiye tara bank bata thiyo
payment mode galat cha wallet ma thiyo cash hoina
english_examples: This was posted as cash but it was actually bank
Payment mode is wrong, it was wallet not cash
journal_entry_rule: Dr [Correct Payment Mode Account] [amount] / Cr [Incorrect Payment Mode Account] [amount]
inventory_rule: No inventory effect from this correction alone
tax_rule_placeholder: Not applicable — this correction does not change the underlying revenue/expense recognition
clarification_questions: Sahi payment mode ke ho?
example_user_inputs: yo cash ma post gareko thiye tara bank bata thiyo
payment mode galat cha wallet ma thiyo cash hoina
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: change_payment_mode, debit: [Correct Account], credit: [Incorrect Account], amount: unchanged}

simple_meaning_en: Attaching a bill or invoice reference number to a transaction that was originally recorded without one
simple_meaning_np: पहिले बिल नम्बर बिना दर्ता भएको कारोबारमा बिल वा इन्भोइस सन्दर्भ नम्बर थप्ने
romanized_examples: bill number chutey pani sale post gareko thiye pheri add garne
invoice number thapna paryo purano entry ma
english_examples: Bill number was missing, need to add it now
Need to attach invoice number to old entry
journal_entry_rule: No new debit/credit entry required; simply update the reference field on the existing transaction record
inventory_rule: No inventory effect
tax_rule_placeholder: Adding a proper bill number retroactively may be important for VAT documentation compliance; confirm any restrictions with CA
clarification_questions: Kun transaction ho ra bill number ke ho?
example_user_inputs: bill number chutey pani sale post gareko thiye pheri add garne
invoice number thapna paryo purano entry ma
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: add_bill_reference, action: update_field, field: bill_number}

simple_meaning_en: A previously issued price quotation or estimate is now being converted into a formal sales invoice because the customer confirmed the order
simple_meaning_np: पहिले जारी गरिएको मूल्य अनुमान वा इस्टिमेट अब औपचारिक बिक्री इन्भोइसमा परिवर्तन गरिने, ग्राहकले अर्डर पुष्टि गरेपछि
romanized_examples: estimate lai invoice ma convert garne customer le confirm garya
quotation ko order confirm bhayo bill banaune
english_examples: Convert the estimate to an invoice, customer confirmed
Quotation order is confirmed, generate the bill
journal_entry_rule: No journal entry exists for the estimate itself (estimates are not transactions); upon conversion, post the actual sale per SAL-01 or SAL-02 rules based on payment terms
inventory_rule: Reduce Inventory only at the point of actual invoice conversion, not at the estimate stage
tax_rule_placeholder: VAT/tax treatment applies only from the point of invoice issuance, not from the estimate date
clarification_questions: Final confirmed amount kati ho, estimate bhanda farak cha ki milcha?
example_user_inputs: estimate lai invoice ma convert garne customer le confirm garya
quotation ko order confirm bhayo bill banaune
example_erp_output: {transaction_type: estimate_to_invoice_conversion, action: create_new_sale_entry, reference: estimate_id}
